executives.name: Shaun Usmar
executives.background: Shaun Usmar is the Founder, Chief Executive Officer and a Director of Triple Flag. He has more than 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to founding Triple Flag, Mr. Usmar was Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Barrick Gold Corporation. He also held significant roles at Xstrata and BHP Billiton.

executives.name: Sheldon Vanderkooy
executives.background: Sheldon Vanderkooy is the Chief Financial Officer of Triple Flag. Prior to this role, he served as the company's General Counsel. Before joining Triple Flag, he was Assistant General Counsel at First Quantum Minerals Ltd. and a partner at Blake, Cassels & Graydon LLP.

executives.name: James Dendle
executives.background: James Dendle is the Senior Vice President, Corporate Development. He is a geologist with over 10 years of experience in the mining sector, including roles in exploration, resource estimation, and business development. He joined Triple Flag in 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Dawn Whittaker
board_of_directors.background: Dawn Whittaker is the Chair of the Board. She is a retired senior partner at Norton Rose Fulbright LLP, where she specialized in corporate finance and mergers and acquisitions in the mining sector. She also serves on the board of Detour Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Shaun Usmar
board_of_directors.background: Shaun Usmar is the Founder, Chief Executive Officer and a Director of Triple Flag. He has more than 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Timothy Baker
board_of_directors.background: Timothy Baker has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Kinross Gold Corporation and held various executive positions at Placer Dome.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Cashin
board_of_directors.background: Peter Cashin is a geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He was the President and CEO of Quest Rare Minerals Ltd. and has held positions with various exploration and mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Susan de Stein
board_of_directors.background: Susan de Stein is a former senior executive with over 30 years of experience in corporate strategy and communications. She has served on several boards in the non-profit and private sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Cicirelli
board_of_directors.background: Mark Cicirelli is a Portfolio Manager at Elliott Investment Management L.P. He has extensive experience in investment management and corporate finance.

sources.source_description: Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
